title: elaeocarpus macrocerus subsp. heinrichii
intro: Elaeocarpus macrocerus subsp. heinrichii is a plant species in the Elaeocarpaceae family, commonly known as a type of blue fig tree. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Elaeocarpus macrocerus subsp. heinrichii is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat conditions like fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
